description_long: This object is a cube-shaped piece of jewelry with a highly geometric and industrial design. Each face of the cube features a large circular opening, revealing a series of concentric rings and structural supports inside, giving it a hollow, openwork appearance. The exterior surfaces are smooth and segmented, with beveled edges and subtle paneling that enhance its modern, engineered aesthetic. The interior rings are symmetrically aligned and appear to be made of a darker material, contrasting with the lighter outer shell. The overall construction suggests a robust, metallic composition, with a focus on symmetry and precision. There are no visible gemstones or intricate engravings, emphasizing a minimalist, geometric motif.
description: A hollow, cube-shaped jewelry piece with large circular openings and concentric inner rings, featuring a modern geometric design in contrasting light and dark materials.
description_view_0: The front view shows a large circular opening with visible concentric rings and structural supports inside the cube.
description_view_1: This view is nearly identical to the front, highlighting the symmetry and the open, ringed interior structure.
description_view_2: The side view displays the same circular opening and inner rings, emphasizing the uniformity and geometric precision of the design.
description_view_3: This view mirrors the others, again showing the openwork structure and the interplay of light and dark materials.
